$comment: PoC #08 Day 1 — jpetstore-6 AP 추출. 8 AP. Modern stack 정합 → 적대성 ↓↓ vs PoC #06+#07 / 그러나 reference webapp demo limitation (보안 + N+1) 명백. AP-PETSTORE-* prefix.

antipatterns.title: Anemic Domain Model — entity = getter/setter only
antipatterns.natural_language: 9 domain entity (Account/Cart/CartItem/Category/Item/LineItem/Order/Product/Sequence) = 모두 getter/setter + 무비즈니스 로직. behavior = service 분산. DDD 위반 / 표준 reference webapp 패턴.
antipatterns.modern_alternative: Domain Aggregate Root + behavior method (e.g., Cart.addItem(item) / Order.calculateTotal())
antipatterns.isomorphic_to_poc06_07: PoC #06 AP-EXCHANGE-002 + PoC #07 AP-CAPITAL-003 (Anemic Service) 와 isomorphic — 단 jpetstore = Domain 까지 anemic

antipatterns.title: Anemic Service — single mapper pass-through
antipatterns.natural_language: AccountService / CatalogService / OrderService 의 대부분 method = mapper.method(param) 단순 위임. CatalogService.getCategoryList() = categoryMapper.getCategoryList() 한 줄. 비즈니스 로직 = Stripes ActionBean (validation) + Service (transaction boundary) + Mapper (SQL) 분산.
antipatterns.modern_alternative: Domain Service + Application Service 분리 / 또는 mapper 직접 controller 호출 (CQRS 단순화)
antipatterns.isomorphic_to_poc06_07: PoC #06+#07 (Anemic Service) 동일 패턴 / Modern stack 에서도 발견 → Anti-pattern 일반성 입증

antipatterns.title: Stripes convention default routing — @HandlesEvent + @UrlBinding 부재
antipatterns.natural_language: ActionBean 의 public Resolution 메서드 = event handler. @DefaultHandler 1개만 명시 / @UrlBinding ❌ → URL = 클래스명 convention (CatalogActionBean → /Catalog.action). paradigm 학습 cost / explicit ❌ implicit ✅.
antipatterns.isomorphic_to_poc06_07: paradigm 다름 — PoC #06+#07 = Spring MVC @RequestMapping (명시적). PoC #08 = Stripes convention (암묵적). paradigm-cross 입증 가치

antipatterns.title: 평문 password 저장 — signon 테이블 평문 + 평문 비교
antipatterns.natural_language: signon 테이블 schema = (username VARCHAR(25), password VARCHAR(25)) — 해시 ❌. AccountService.getAccount(username, password) → accountMapper.getAccountByUsernameAndPassword(평문 비교). reference webapp demo limitation but production = 보안 취약 critical.
antipatterns.modern_alternative: Spring Security + bcrypt/argon2 + PasswordEncoder. salted hash 의무.
antipatterns.isomorphic_to_poc06_07: ❌ — PoC #06+#07 = 사내 인증 별도 (LIVE_SQL.SGERP) → 본 PoC 신규 AP 분류

antipatterns.title: Product 검색 keyword 별 SQL 호출 — N+1 like
antipatterns.natural_language: CatalogService.searchProductList(keywords) → keywords.split('\\s+').forEach(keyword → productMapper.searchProductList('%' + keyword + '%')). 매 keyword 별 별도 SQL execution + client-side aggregation.
antipatterns.modern_alternative: 단일 SQL = MyBatis <foreach> + OR 또는 FULL TEXT SEARCH / Elasticsearch / PostgreSQL tsvector
antipatterns.isomorphic_to_poc06_07: N+1 패턴 일반 — PoC #06+#07 = LOOP 내 SQL 호출 (다른 형태) 와 isomorphic

antipatterns.title: Order 조회 = lineItem × 2 SQL N+1 fetch
antipatterns.natural_language: OrderService.getOrder(orderId) — order 1 SQL + lineItems 1 SQL + lineItem.forEach(itemMapper.getItem + getInventoryQuantity) → lineItem 수 N → 1 + 1 + N×2 = 2 + 2N SQL. 명백 N+1.
antipatterns.modern_alternative: 단일 SQL JOIN (order + lineitem + item + inventory) 또는 MyBatis <association>/<collection> nested ResultMap

antipatterns.title: DB native sequence ❌ — 자체 sequence 테이블 + race condition
antipatterns.natural_language: ordernum sequence = sequence 테이블 (name PK / nextid INT) 자체 관리. SequenceMapper.getSequence(SELECT) + updateSequence(UPDATE nextid+1). multi-RDBMS 호환 의도 but UPDATE 후 SELECT race condition risk (concurrent insert 시 동일 orderId).
antipatterns.modern_alternative: DB native sequence (PostgreSQL SEQUENCE / MySQL AUTO_INCREMENT / Oracle SEQUENCE) 또는 UUID v4 / Snowflake ID. multi-RDBMS = DB 별 dialect 분기.
antipatterns.$comment_intent: ambiguous — multi-RDBMS 호환 의도 vs race risk. reference webapp demo 는 단일 사용자 가정 → race ❌.

antipatterns.title: HashMap parameter — type safety 부재 (insertOrder 내부)
antipatterns.natural_language: OrderService.insertOrder 내부 itemMapper.updateInventoryQuantity 호출 시 Map<String, Object> param = (itemId, increment) HashMap 생성. type safety ❌ — runtime fail risk.
antipatterns.modern_alternative: DTO record (Java 16+) 또는 @Param 명시적 mapper signature
antipatterns.isomorphic_to_poc06_07: PoC #06+#07 = 전체 endpoint Map<String, Object> + 강제 캐스팅 / PoC #08 = 일부 (insertOrder 내부) 만 → Modern stack = type safety 일반 ↑

summary.$comment_summary: 8 AP / 1 critical (보안 평문 password) + 1 high (N+1 Order fetch) + 4 medium (Anemic 2 + N+1 search + sequence) + 2 low (Stripes convention + HashMap). isomorphic = 5 (PoC #06+#07 패턴 일반성 입증). novel = 3 (보안 + Stripes + sequence) — paradigm-cross MEDIUM corroboration 자격 강화.
